title: Tensura Epic Fight Compatibility
description: A datapack that lets tensura weapons use epic fight's combat system
body:
A simple datapack that lets tensura weapons utilise epic fight's combat mechanichs while taking account of their stats compared to their vanilla counterparts.

Detailed explanation:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The datapack converts the stats like this:
- stone,wood,gold - stone epic fight stats
- iron,silver - iron epic fight stats
- diamond - diamond epic fight stats
- anything above (damage wise) - netherite epic fight stats

</details>

Known Issues
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Epic fight uses a custom player armature that causes some custom armors to not show up or appear with missing textures when using epic fight's combat mode.
For the same reason player size modified by tensura doesnt affect epic fights model causing the player to be deafult sized when in combat mode, looks fine in first person since your view stays the same as it should but third person is bugged. 

--this is not an issue caused by this datapack just an issue that exists between epic fight and tensura
</details>
